greeting: Hello! I'm Eduardo's AI companion. Ask me anything about him!
Hi there! I'm here to tell you all about Eduardo Souza Rodrigues.
Welcome! What would you like to know about Eduardo?
Nice to meet you! I can tell you about Eduardo's skills, education, projects, and more.
about: Eduardo Souza Rodrigues is a Junior Developer born on August 9, 2005, in Campinas, SP, Brazil.
He graduated from the Technical High School in Computer Science at SENAC and is currently pursuing a degree in Systems Analysis and Development at São Francisco University (USF).
He is passionate about creating digital solutions that improve people's lives and promote sustainable development.
Since childhood, Eduardo has had hands-on experience with software and hardware, including Unity, Arduino IDE, and Construct 3.
portfolio: Eduardo's portfolio is available at https://eduardo2580.github.io/ and showcases his development projects.
His work spans web development, game development, and open-source contributions.
He maintains an active GitHub profile at https://github.com/eduardo2580 with his latest projects.
projects: Eduardo developed Campo Minado (Minesweeper) in 2026, a computer program available on his GitHub.
As a Young Apprentice (Jovem Aprendiz) in 2024, he built games using Construct 3 and managed game registration and spreadsheet organization.
He participates in immersive development programs such as Alura's AI Agents Immersion and Back-End Dev Immersion.
His academic work includes the presentation 'The Future of Work' (2023), awarded Best Social Impact Project at SENAC.
technologies: Frontend: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Responsive Design, GitHub Pages
Backend & Platforms: C#, SQL, Node.js, ServiceNow, Windows Forms
Tools & Environments: Git, Visual Studio, Oracle VirtualBox, Microsoft 365, Android Studio
Other: Unity, Arduino IDE, Construct 3, Cybersecurity basics
skills: Web Development: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (University of Michigan certified)
Platforms: ServiceNow (Shark Bootcamp editions 4 and 8, Cask Camp), Introduction to Generative AI

Soft Skills: Problem-solving, teamwork, communication, social impact mindset, sustainability

Earned the SENAC Project of the Year Award in Social Impact (2023) for the 'Future of Work' project.
Participated in Bootcamp Shark in ServiceNow editions 4 and 8, and the Cask Camp Ultimate ServiceNow Bootcamp (20h).
Attended multiple academic events at USF on cybersecurity, academic writing, and international exchange experiences.

about: Eduardo Souza Rodrigues es un Desarrollador Junior nacido el 9 de agosto de 2005 en Campinas, SP, Brasil.
Se graduó en la Escuela Técnica de Informática del SENAC y actualmente cursa Análisis de Sistemas y Desarrollo en la Universidad São Francisco (USF).
Es apasionado por crear soluciones digitales que mejoren la vida de las personas y promuevan el desarrollo sostenible.
Desde la infancia, Eduardo tiene experiencia práctica con software y hardware, incluyendo Unity, Arduino IDE y Construct 3.
portfolio: El portafolio de Eduardo está disponible en https://eduardo2580.github.io/ y muestra sus proyectos de desarrollo.

Como Joven Aprendiz en 2024, construyó juegos con Construct 3 y gestionó registros y planillas.

about: Eduardo Souza Rodrigues é um Desenvolvedor Junior nascido em 09/08/2005, em Campinas, SP, Brasil.
Formado no Ensino Médio Técnico em Informática pelo SENAC Registro, está cursando Análise e Desenvolvimento de Sistemas na Universidade São Francisco (USF).
É entusiasta de tecnologia, motivado por criar soluções digitais que melhorem a vida das pessoas e promovam o desenvolvimento sustentável.
Desde a infância, tem experiência prática com software e hardware, incluindo Unity, Arduino IDE e Construct 3.
portfolio: O portfólio de Eduardo está disponível em https://eduardo2580.github.io/ e apresenta seus projetos de desenvolvimento.
Seu trabalho abrange desenvolvimento web, criação de jogos e contribuições de código aberto.
Ele mantém um perfil ativo no GitHub em https://github.com/eduardo2580 com seus projetos mais recentes.
projects: Eduardo desenvolveu o Campo Minado em 2026, um programa disponível no seu GitHub.
Como Jovem Aprendiz em 2024, construiu jogos com o Construct 3, realizou cadastramento de jogos e organizou planilhas.
Participou de imersões como a Imersão Dev Agentes de IA Google e a Imersão Dev Back-End da Alura.
Seu trabalho acadêmico inclui a apresentação 'O Futuro do Trabalho' (2023), premiada como Melhor Projeto de Impacto Social no SENAC.
